playlists.name: Sunlit Indie Journeys
playlists.description: A serene mix of ambient folk and indie sounds with a dreamy, introspective mood perfect for reflective afternoons and peaceful moments.
playlists.cover_prompt: soft morning light through translucent curtains, warm beige tones, calm and cozy atmosphere

playlists.name: Electric Night Anthems
playlists.description: High-energy electronic and dance tracks that pump up the vibe for late night parties or energetic sessions, filled with big room and tropical house beats.
playlists.cover_prompt: neon lights reflecting on wet street, vibrant blue and pink tones, urban nightlife energy

playlists.name: Golden Era Rock Classics
playlists.description: Timeless classic rock anthems with energetic guitars and memorable riffs, perfect for a nostalgic road trip or a throwback chill session.
playlists.cover_prompt: golden sunset highway drive, warm orange and red tones, vintage car silhouette

playlists.name: Velvet Soul & Heartfelt Pop
playlists.description: Smooth pop soul tunes and soft, emotional pop melodies filled with vulnerability and warmth, perfect for intimate evenings or calming moments.
playlists.cover_prompt: soft pink and lavender gradient, subtle glowing orbs, warm and inviting mood

playlists.name: Urban Flow & Modern Vibes
playlists.description: A fresh selection of contemporary urban, hip hop, reggaeton, and afrobeat tracks with varied rhythms and vibrant energy for a confident and modern listening mood.
playlists.cover_prompt: colorful city murals under sunset light, dynamic shapes, youthful and bold style

playlists.name: Soft Reflections & Tender Ballads
playlists.description: Gentle, heartfelt ballads and soft pop gems focusing on emotional narration and soothing melodies, ideal for quiet evenings or moments of deep thought.
playlists.cover_prompt: rainy windowpane with soft golden reflections, muted cool tones, melancholic warmth
